issues.description: TrashFromHand trashes from hand, but card text says 'trash 2 cards from the top of your deck' – should be trashing from deck, not hand. No standard action exists for this; requires custom implementation or clarification that this is a deck mill effect.
Text states 'during this turn' which indicates duration should be 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. 'During this turn' is a turn-scoped duration, not end-of-turn.
Target allows 'up to 1' character, but ChooseOpponentCharacter may not enforce the 'up to' (optional choice). Verify target syntax supports optional selection.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [When Attacking] You may trash 2 cards from the top of your deck: Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −1 cost during this turn.
